summary: High‑quality audience tape with a solid second set and pleasant typical‑1980 vibe
review: The reviewer praises the recording as a standout audience source with broadcast‑level clarity that holds up well in mono, describing it as a “really nice pleasant listen” characteristic of the early ’80s. The show’s second set is called solid, though no specific songs are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights both excellent tape quality and a solid performance, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Broadcast‑quality sound for an audience tape; clear, balanced enough to sound good in mono, no major phase or balance issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set includes UJB > Playin! but the reviewer focuses on the solid feel of the second set overall.
